name: SAAB ROYALE RESORT TERMS AND CONDITIONS

origin.filename: SAAB ROYALE RESORT TERMS AND CONDITIONS.pdf

texts.label: text
texts.orig: SAAB ROYALE RESORT TERMS AND CONDITIONS;
texts.text: SAAB ROYALE RESORT TERMS AND CONDITIONS;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ➢ In the event that a guest needs to cancel their booking after a reservation the hotel will assess a percentage-based refund based on the following:
texts.text: In the event that a guest needs to cancel their booking after a reservation the hotel will assess a percentage-based refund based on the following:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 21 Days Prior To the Date of Arrival 25% of the Room Charged after 16% VAT deductions.
texts.text: 21 Days Prior To the Date of Arrival 25% of the Room Charged after 16% VAT deductions.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 14 Days Prior To the Date of Arrival 75% of the Room Charged after 16% VAT deductions
texts.text: 14 Days Prior To the Date of Arrival 75% of the Room Charged after 16% VAT deductions

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 7 Days Prior To the Date of Arrival 100% of the Room Charged.
texts.text: 7 Days Prior To the Date of Arrival 100% of the Room Charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · No Show Room Rate Is Charged At 100%.
texts.text: No Show Room Rate Is Charged At 100%.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ➢ In the event that the reservation is not location specific and payment are made a fee of 10% of the payments made will be charged before the refund process begins.
texts.text: In the event that the reservation is not location specific and payment are made a fee of 10% of the payments made will be charged before the refund process begins.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ➢ In case of documented emergencies or exceptional circumstances (e.g., illness, family emergencies), the hotel may consider a full or partial refund on a case-by-case basis.
texts.text: In case of documented emergencies or exceptional circumstances (e.g., illness, family emergencies), the hotel may consider a full or partial refund on a case-by-case basis.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ➢ Our check in time is at 2:00 p.m and our check out time is 11:00 a.m.
texts.text: Our check in time is at 2:00 p.m and our check out time is 11:00 a.m.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ➢ A late check out  fee will apply to anyone who checks out past 12.00 noon.
texts.text: A late check out  fee will apply to anyone who checks out past 12.00 noon.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Note: The refund percentage is calculated based on the remaining nights of the booked stay. All refund requests should be made in writing or through official communication channels. Refunds will be processed within [specified time frame, i.e., 5-7 business days] after
texts.text: Note: The refund percentage is calculated based on the remaining nights of the booked stay. All refund requests should be made in writing or through official communication channels. Refunds will be processed within [specified time frame, i.e., 5-7 business days] after
